# ITA - Gestione Cespiti

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:9bd55c665f83fe7304bcef1fd80d788604435709ed8da9ff8707b62bf6d33d8d
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This modules allows account management of companies' assets.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

**English**

You can create and manage assets from accounting section of Odoo.

Configuration must be done from Assets -> Assets Configuration, where
depreciation types, modes and assets categories can be found.

Assets can both be created manually or via invoices and journal entries.
Depreciations can be generated by using the related wizard found in
Assets -> Assets Management -> Generate Depreciations, or by triggering
the same wizard from a single asset form view.

**Italiano**

È possibile creare e gestire cespiti dalla sezione contabilità di Odoo.

La configurazione dei cespiti dev'essere fatta andando in Cespiti ->
Configurazione Cespiti, dove si trovano le categorie dei beni, i tipi e
le modalità di ammortamento.

I cespiti possono essere creati manualmente o da fatture e registrazioni
contabili. Gli ammortamenti possono essere generati utilizzando
l'apposito wizard in Cespiti -> Gestione Cestpiti -> Genera
Ammortamenti, o aprendo quello stesso wizard dalla scheda del cespite.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/l10n-italy/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/l10n-italy/issues/new?body=module:%20l10n_it_asset_management%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

documentation: Compute how much of `base_amount` can be depreciated.

documentation: Dismisses asset partially and returns it

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation.AssetDepreciation._compute_last_depreciation_date
documentation:
Update date upon deps with at least one depreciation line (excluding
partial dismissal); else set field to False

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation.AssetDepreciation.get_pro_rata_temporis_dates
documentation:
Gets useful dates for pro rata temporis computations, according to
given date, by retrieving its fiscal year.

```
param date

given date for depreciation

return

date objects triplet (dt_start, dt, dt_end)
- dt_start: fiscal year first day
- dt: given date
- dt_end: fiscal year last day
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation.AssetDepreciation.get_pro_rata_temporis_multiplier
documentation:
Computes and returns pro rata temporis multiplier according to given
depreciation, date, fiscal year and mode
\:param date: given date as a fields.Date string
\:param mode: string, defines how to compute multiplier. Valid values:

> - 'std': start-to-date, computes multiplier using days from fiscal
>   : year's first day to given date;
> - 'dte': date-to-end, computes multiplier using days from given
>   : date to fiscal year's last day

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation.AssetDepreciation.normalize_first_dep_nr
documentation:
Normalize first numbered line according to `first_dep_nr` value
\:param force: if True, force normalization

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.account_fiscal_year.AccountFiscalYear.get_fiscal_year_by_date
documentation:
Retrieves fiscal year by given `date` (a datetime.date object).

By default, only 1 fiscal year will be returned, unless specified
differently.
If `miss_raise` is True and no fiscal year is found, an error will be
raised.

classes.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_accounting_info.AssetAccountingInfo

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_accounting_info.AssetAccountingInfo.cron_vacuum_table
documentation: A cron that deletes obsolete records

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_accounting_info.AssetAccountingInfo.get_records_to_delete_by_cron
documentation:
Returns every a.a.info that fits the condition:
    (no asset AND no depreciation line)
    OR
    (no move AND no move line)

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_accounting_info.AssetAccountingInfo.normalize_info
documentation: Normalize asset accounting info if needed

This model is necessary to manage info about the relationships between
assets and accounting records. We could have used `Many2many` fields to
create tables between assets, depreciation lines, account moves and account
move lines; but we need a custom
management, a bit more complex than the one provided by the standard
`Many2many` field.

NB: a few methods could have been decorated with @api.constrains or
@api.depends, but that would have limited them by being triggered only
upon some fields' changes, and would have made it very hard to be
customizable by third party modules.
Therefore, it has been chosen to define them as simple Python methods which
are called right after `create` and `write` methods if some fields
(which can be retrieved by method `get_main_fields`) are found within
`vals` dictionary.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation_line.AssetDepreciationLine.get_balances_grouped
documentation:
Groups balances of line in `self` by line.move_type, adding all

Normalize depreciation numbers to be consecutive for depreciation
and historical lines within the same depreciation set; force to 0
every non-depreciation line.
\:param force: force normalization for every depreciations' lines

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.models.asset_depreciation_line.AssetDepreciationLine.get_account_move_line_vals_methods

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_entry_in_update_asset
documentation:
An entry adding to the asset account
creates a positive accounting info.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_entry_out_update_asset
documentation:
An entry removing from the asset account
creates a negative accounting info.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_max_amount_depreciable
documentation:
Set max amount depreciable in category line,
if the asset has a higher amount, the max amount is set as depreciable instead.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_journal_prev_year
documentation: Previous year depreciation considers depreciation of all previous years

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_monthly_depreciation
documentation:
Monthly depreciation uses 1/12 of the coefficient
of the year the depreciation is in.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_missing_fiscal_year_warning
documentation:
If some years are not configured as fiscal years,

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_override_journal
documentation:
Set an "Override Journal" in the depreciation wizard,
the journal entries are created in the selected journal.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.tests.test_assets_management.TestAssets.test_same_asset_report_residual_partial_depreciation
documentation:
Partially depreciate an asset,
the residual value in the asset and in the report are the same.

functions.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.report.asset_journal.format_date
documentation: Formats record's field value according to given format `fmt`

classes.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.report.asset_journal.Report

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.report.asset_journal.Report.print_report
documentation:
This method is called from the JS widget buttons 'Print'
and 'Export' in the HTML view.
Prints PDF and XLSX reports.
\:param report_type: string that represents the report type

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_it_asset_management.report.asset_journal.Report.get_html
documentation: Method needed from JavaScript widget to render HTML view

This report has the following structure:
    * Report (which is just a data container)
    ** Category
    *** Asset
    **** Depreciation
    ***** Depreciation Line by Year
Each class is set to be linked via a M2O to its parent class, and via
a O2M to its child class.
Each class is linked to Report via `report_id` field.
Asset and Depreciation Line by Year both have a relation to the section
Accounting Data which stores sale/purchase data.
